phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Critical blockers that prevent all other work

features.name: TypeScript Compilation Fix
features.description: Resolve 32+ TypeScript errors blocking builds across monorepo
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm build succeeds with zero errors

testScenarios.scenario: Full monorepo build completes without errors

features.name: Bundle Size Optimization
features.description: Reduce VS Code extension bundle from 11MB to <2MB
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle size check enforced in CI

features.name: Unified Token Validation
features.description: Centralized middleware for validating API keys and session tokens
acceptanceCriteria: Single validateToken() function used by all endpoints
Redis caching for token validation (<5ms p95)
TokenContext includes userId, orgId, tier, permissions
Invalid tokens return 401 with structured error

testScenarios.scenario: Valid API key returns correct TokenContext

testScenarios.validation: Assert Redis get called, DB not called

features.name: Analytics Consolidation
features.description: Remove 6 unused analytics providers, consolidate to PostHog only
acceptanceCriteria: Mixpanel, Plausible, Umami, Pirsch providers removed

features.name: Database Migrations Validation
features.description: Verify all migrations apply cleanly and schema matches Drizzle definitions
acceptanceCriteria: drizzle-kit push succeeds on fresh DB
All FK constraints with CASCADE deletes verified
Indexes exist for common query patterns

phases.name: Identity & Authentication
phases.description: OAuth, sessions, API keys, and extension auth flow

features.name: GitHub OAuth Flow
features.description: Sign in with GitHub using Better Auth
acceptanceCriteria: Click 'Sign in with GitHub' redirects to GitHub

testScenarios.validation: User created, session active, redirected to dashboard
Error page shown, no session created

features.name: Google OAuth Flow
features.description: Sign in with Google using Better Auth
acceptanceCriteria: Click 'Sign in with Google' redirects to Google
Email verified flag set from Google

features.name: Session Token Management
features.description: Create, refresh, and validate session tokens

features.name: Cookie Security
features.description: httpOnly cookies with proper security flags

features.name: API Key Generation
features.description: Generate secure API keys with sk_live_ prefix
acceptanceCriteria: Key shown only once at creation

features.name: API Key Storage
features.description: Secure storage of hashed keys with metadata
acceptanceCriteria: Keys table with hash, prefix, userId, orgId
FK to user with CASCADE delete

features.name: API Key Rotation
features.description: Generate new key while keeping old active briefly
acceptanceCriteria: New key generated with same permissions
Old key auto-revoked after grace period

testScenarios.validation: Both keys valid during grace, old expires

features.name: API Key Usage Tracking
features.description: Track requests per key for billing/analytics

features.name: Extension Browser Auth Redirect
features.description: Open browser for OAuth, return to extension
acceptanceCriteria: Success shows notification with API key

testScenarios.validation: Browser opens, user logs in, key stored in extension

features.name: One-Time Grant Exchange
features.description: Exchange grant code for API key

testScenarios.validation: Code exchanged, key returned, code deleted

features.name: Secure Credential Storage
features.description: Store API key in OS keychain via keytar

features.name: Token Refresh
acceptanceCriteria: Fallback to re-auth if refresh fails

features.name: Offline Mode Detection
features.description: Detect network unavailability and switch to offline mode
acceptanceCriteria: Health check to API on activation

testScenarios.validation: Offline mode activated, status bar updated

features.name: SaveContext Type
features.description: Input type for decision engine containing all save context
acceptanceCriteria: Type includes: filePath, fileExtension, repoId, timestamp

features.name: AutoDecisionEngine.decide()
features.description: Pure function that evaluates SaveContext and returns ProtectionDecision

features.name: Decision Configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Config loaded from VS Code settings

testScenarios.validation: package.json always creates snapshot regardless of risk

features.name: AutoDecisionEngine Tests
acceptanceCriteria: Table-driven tests for all input combinations
Edge cases: empty context, null values

features.name: SignalAggregator Interface
features.description: Interface for collecting signals from detectors

testScenarios.validation: Returns combined signals from all detectors

features.name: Wire AI Detector
features.description: Connect AI detector to signal aggregator
acceptanceCriteria: AI detector result populates aiDetected, aiToolName, aiConfidence

features.name: Wire Burst Detector
features.description: Connect burst detector to signal aggregator

features.name: Wire Session Grouper
features.description: Connect session grouper to signal aggregator
acceptanceCriteria: Creates new session on burst or timeout

features.name: SaveContextBuilder
features.description: VS Code adapter that builds SaveContext from document

testScenarios.validation: All SaveContext fields populated from document

features.name: Basic AI Detection
features.description: Local pattern matching for AI-generated code

features.name: ML-Based AI Detection
features.description: Server-side ML model for advanced detection

testScenarios.validation: Returns confidence > 0.8 for obvious AI code

features.name: Burst Detection
features.description: Detect rapid sequential saves indicating AI burst

testScenarios.validation: Old entries removed after window expires

features.name: Session Start on Burst
features.description: Create new session when burst detected
acceptanceCriteria: Session tracks all files in burst

testScenarios.validation: Burst triggers new session, notification shown

phases.name: Storage Layer
phases.description: File-based local storage and optional cloud backup

features.name: CooldownCache
acceptanceCriteria: Get cooldown returns null if expired

testScenarios.validation: Entry retrievable before expiry, null after
Same content stored once, isNew=false on second store

features.name: SnapshotStore
acceptanceCriteria: Create snapshot: returns manifest with ID
Manifest JSON: id, timestamp, trigger, files, metadata
List snapshots with filters (after, before, trigger)

features.name: SessionStore
acceptanceCriteria: Session manifest: id, startedAt, endedAt, reason, files

features.name: AuditLog
acceptanceCriteria: Append entry: action, filePath, snapshotId, timestamp

features.name: StorageManager
acceptanceCriteria: Unified API: cooldowns, snapshots, sessions, audit

testScenarios.validation: Same input always produces same hash

features.name: Snapshot Cloud Sync
features.description: Sync snapshots to server for cross-device access

features.name: Cloud Conflict Resolution
features.description: Handle conflicts between local and cloud

features.name: Cross-Device Restore
features.description: Restore snapshot from cloud on different device

testScenarios.validation: Snapshot created on device A, restored on device B

phases.name: Snapshot & Recovery
phases.description: Snapshot creation, restoration, and session management

features.name: SnapshotOrchestrator
features.description: Coordinates snapshot creation with rate limiting
acceptanceCriteria: Returns manifest or null if rate limited

features.name: Content Deduplication
acceptanceCriteria: Skip if all file hashes match

testScenarios.validation: No snapshot created if content identical

features.name: Snapshot Metadata
features.description: Extract and store metadata with snapshot

testScenarios.validation: Snapshot has sessionId, session lists snapshot

features.name: Snapshot Telemetry
acceptanceCriteria: Properties: trigger, fileCount, aiDetected, sessionId, latencyMs

testScenarios.validation: All files written, match original content

features.name: File Tracking Per Session
acceptanceCriteria: Add file to session on save

features.name: Session Summary
acceptanceCriteria: Summary: file count, duration, AI detected

features.name: ML Model Integration
features.description: Load and run ML model for risk scoring

features.name: Analysis Caching
acceptanceCriteria: Cache key: hash of diff + context

features.name: DBSCAN Endpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Output: groups[] with label, snapshotIds, reason

phases.name: MCP Server
phases.description: Model Context Protocol server for AI assistants

features.name: HTTP/SSE Transport
features.description: HTTP with Server-Sent Events for web

testScenarios.validation: Request via HTTP, response via SSE

features.name: Tool Registration
acceptanceCriteria: Each tool has name, description, inputSchema

features.name: MCP Authentication
features.description: API key validation for MCP requests

features.name: Input Validation
features.description: Zod schema validation for tool inputs

features.name: Error Sanitization
features.description: Sanitize errors before returning to AI

testScenarios.validation: No stack traces in production errors

features.name: analyze_risk Tool (Basic)
features.description: Basic risk analysis for AI assistants

features.name: analyze_risk Tool (Enhanced)
features.description: ML-enhanced risk analysis for Pro tier

features.name: ctx7.resolve-library-id
features.description: Resolve library name to Context7 ID

features.name: Auth Command
features.description: snapback auth for API key management
acceptanceCriteria: snapback auth login: prompt for key
snapback auth status: show current auth

features.name: Output Formatting
acceptanceCriteria: Default: table for TTY, JSON for pipes

phases.name: Web Dashboard
phases.description: Marketing site, auth, and SaaS dashboard

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Marketing landing page with value prop

testScenarios.validation: All metrics shown with correct values

features.name: API Key List
acceptanceCriteria: Table with prefix, name, created, last used

features.name: Property Sanitization
acceptanceCriteria: Blocklist: path, filePath, email, user, ip

features.name: TierResolver Service
features.description: Resolve user tier from API key

testScenarios.validation: Free tier blocked from Pro features

features.name: Upgrade Prompts
features.description: Show upgrade prompts when hitting limits

features.name: Activation Funnel E2E
features.description: Full install → auth → first save test

testScenarios.validation: User recovers from bad AI change
